fields.description: DocType the correction targets. Audit-log DocTypes (Asset Status Log, Comp Admission Log) are corrected by appending a correction row only — the original audit row stays pristine. Mutable DocTypes (Cash Drop, Venue Asset) are mutated AND a correction row records the change.
fields.label: Target DocType
fields.options:
Asset Status Log
Cash Drop
Comp Admission Log
Venue Asset

fields.description: Optional — the specific field being corrected (e.g. `reason`, `declared_amount`). Leave blank for a row-level correction note.
fields.label: Target Field

fields.description: Auto-set to frappe.session.user at insert time.
fields.label: Operator

fields.description: Auto-set to now() at insert time.
fields.label: Timestamp

fields.description: What the field said before the correction (or null for new rows / row-level notes).
fields.label: Old Value

fields.description: What the field says after the correction (or null for audit-log row-level notes).
fields.label: New Value

fields.description: REQUIRED. Why is this correction being made? Free text — typo, mis-attribution, system glitch, dispute resolved, etc. Auditable record of intent.
fields.label: Reason

fields.description: Legacy fields kept for backward compatibility with pre-DEC-066 rows. New corrections should use the polymorphic target fields above.
fields.label: Legacy (pre-DEC-066)
